title: AgentSession

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

parentSessionRef.description: URN of the parent session when this is a sub-session (null for root sessions).

role.description: Functional role this agent session plays in the overall task.

mode.description: Interaction mode: plan (propose-only), ask (clarify), execute (take actions), or review (read-only assessment).

workspaceRef.description: URN or path identifying the workspace repository being operated on.

worktreeRef.description: Optional URN of the git worktree used for isolated edits.

substrate.description: Execution substrate the agent is running on.

surface.description: Execution surface constraints (sandbox, network, paths) for this session.

provider.description: Model or service provider backing the agent (e.g., 'openai', 'anthropic').

skillRefs.description: Ordered list of SkillManifest URNs active during this session.

memoryRefs.description: URNs of MemoryEntry objects injected into the session context.

transcriptRef.description: Optional URN pointing to the full conversation transcript artifact.

decisionRefs.description: URNs of ExecutionDecision records (urn:srcos:exec-decision:<id>) produced during this session.

telemetryRefs.description: URNs of TelemetryEvent records emitted during this session.

time.description: Session timing: startedAt and optional endedAt (ISO 8601).

description: A record of a single agent task-execution session, capturing the role, substrate, execution surface, skill/memory references, and timing for a discrete unit of agentic work.
